ai.agent.description: AI agent — LLM-powered assistant with topics, tools, and sources
ai.agent.setup_flow: Create agent → create topic with tools → link tools (set use_in_ai=True first) → create composer → create prompt buttons

ai.topic.description: AI topic with instructions and linked server action tools
ai.topic.tool_ids_note: Domain filter: [['use_in_ai', '=', True]] — tools without use_in_ai=True are silently rejected

ai.composer.description: AI composer — links agent to UI surfaces (systray, chatter, email)

interface_keys.systray_ai_button: Ask AI button in top bar — main chat interface
interface_keys.chatter_ai_button: AI button on record chatter — context-aware help
interface_keys.mail_composer: AI button in email composer — draft/reply assistance

ai.prompt.button.description: Quick-prompt button attached to an ai.composer for one-click actions
ai.prompt.button.note: Ordered by sequence field — lower numbers appear first

ir.actions.server.description: Server action — AI tools are server actions with state='code' on ai.agent model
ir.actions.server.context_available: ai (dict for result), env (Odoo environment), record (the ai.agent record), time, datetime, dateutil, json

mail.message.inbox_domain_field: partner_ids (NOT message_partner_ids — that field does not exist on mail.message)

use_in_ai_false.symptom: Tool write returns True but tool_ids field stays empty on topic
use_in_ai_false.cause: tool_ids domain filter: [['use_in_ai', '=', True]] — silently rejects tools with use_in_ai=False
use_in_ai_false.fix: Set use_in_ai=True on the server action before linking to topic

wrong_field_name.cause: Using message_partner_ids instead of partner_ids on mail.message

mcp_many2many_broken.symptom: validate_write + execute_approved_write returns True but many2many field unchanged
mcp_many2many_broken.cause: MCP write handler doesn't persist many2many relation commands
mcp_many2many_broken.fix: Use direct XML-RPC (xmlrpc.client) for many2many writes

test_data_patterns.inbox_emails: mail.message.create({subject, body, author_id, partner_ids, message_type:'email', date})
